entry.title: Re: Mongo ODBC Connection - failing to connect, Crystal 2...
entry.content:
I suggest contacting Atlas and asking them if they have any special configuration settings to connect to Crystal Reports.

Note: Cr 2020 is a 64 bit application.

Quick test.

Right click on crw64.exe and select Run as Administrator.

Don't open a report, click on File, Log on/off server, ODBC, your 64 bit DSN, fill in the log on info and see if that works. Sometimes existing reports or the report wizard can cause issues when connecting.

FYI - Mongo DB or Atlas is not listed in the Database PAM for CR, but generic ODBC clients typically do work. something in their DLL is causing CR to crash:

Faulting module name: atsql.dll, version: 1.4.2.0, time stamp: 0x675af79d

entry.title: Exchange Property management in Split-Gather blocks
entry.content:
Exchange Properties created before the Split-Gather block will be available within and after the block. However, if an Exchange Property is created within the Split-Gather block, there is a high chance its value will be replaced during the last execution of the Split. The probability of overwriting or data loss increases when Parallel Processing is used.

To capture information within the Split-Gather block without overwriting or missing values, the solution is to create Exchange Properties with a random naming pattern.

Here is a sample iFlow that demonstrates how to create dynamic Exchange Properties using UUID and then collect values in these properties.

Here are the configurations of Splitter - Gather and Content Modifier.

Groovy script for CreateProperties

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.util.UUID
import java.time.Instant

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def now = Instant.now().toString()
    def CamelSplitIndex = message.getProperty('CamelSplitIndex')
    message.setProperty("p_ExchangeProperty_${UUID.randomUUID()}", "now:${now} \t CamelSplitIndex:${CamelSplitIndex}\r\n")
    return message
}

Groovy script for CollectProperties

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def concatenatedString = message.getProperties().findAll { it.key.startsWith('p_ExchangeProperty') }.values().join('')
    message.setProperty('p_ConcatenatedString', concatenatedString)
    return message
}

Result: Exchange Properties are created with in the Split-Gather block and we are able to store data into properties without data loss.

entry.title: Re: Does Basic Syntax support the Format function?
entry.content:
Once in CR Designer hit the F1 key to open the help file and search for Round:

Basic and Crystal syntax.

Overloads

  • Round (x)

  • Round (x, #places)

entry.title: Program FAGL_CL_REGROUP
entry.content:
Program FAGL_CL_REGROUP regroups vendors with a debit balance and customers with a credit balance.

However, when running it, open customer payments are also taken into account for regrouping, even if the customer balance is positive. This doesn't apply to all customer payments, but only to some.

There is no apparent logic to why some open payments for customers with positive balance are considered, while others are not.

Have you experienced this before?

Thank you

entry.title: Multi currency for a customer
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please let me know if we can maintain Multiple Currency for a Single Customer.

Same customer biils in different currency

 

Rg

Siva

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays onl...
entry.content:
You already stated the current version you are using. I'm asking what version did you use before updating?

This will help R&D figure out when it may have changed so they can look at the history for that area of the viewer.

entry.title: Re: How to calculate user defined average in data action in SAC?
entry.content: Hi nikhil,we are using opex standard modek.calmonth is not there.Memberset of d/date is there.we have p01,p02.how to bring this formula for average.our scenario is calculate average of till septetmber and copy to next year plan for all months.jan to sep average.amount is measure.

entry.title: Re: BTP HANA temporarily unavailable
entry.content: Hey If you have this kind of problem try using a different browser or try going incognitio mode on chrome and this might work. I just copied the url and opened it on safari and it worked. I also tried to go incognitio on chrome and it also worked. Also another solution might be to clear your local cache on chrome

entry.title: Re: Static Factory Actions with Deep Parameters don't work
entry.content: which line of code failed?

entry.title: How to interrupt Fiori application loading at startup (Fiori Elements, OData V4)?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have to implement the following business requirement: There's a SPRO setting that enables or disables my custom Fiori application, and I must interrupt (or proceed with) application loading based on this parameter. The app is built using Fiori Elements, OData V4 and I'm utilizing Flexible Programming Model wherever possible.

I have tried a few approaches, but none seems to work. Two of them are as follows:

  • I override onInit (or onBeforeRendering) methods in the List Page controller extension, where I read SPRO setting from service (it works), display an error message box (also works), but the app keeps loading in the background, which is what I want to avoid. In freestyle apps I used the trick with a placeholder with autoClose setting set to false and closing it if the app is enabled in SPRO, but in case of Fiori Elements app this placeholder seems to have no effect on the app in the manifest...
  • I created a custom "landing page" with the message that the app is disabled, but if it's enabled, I planned to navigate to the List Page immediately. Again, querying backend works, the page is loading and displaying my message, but I simply can't force navigation to the List Page if the app is enabled...

I would sincerely appreciate if you share your ideas about how to deal with that requirement.

Regards,

Mykyta

entry.title: Re: Controlling Area in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: There was a conscious decision to deliver only one controlling area in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. This had to do with harmonizing the Finance applications and supporting a group perspective for management reporting while allowing intercompany cost allocations, which can only take place within a single controlling area. In parallel we looked at the historic reasons why customers had used different controlling areas in the past (e.g. using the controlling area currency as a functional currency rather than a group currency, splitting the controlling area to handle different fiscal year variants,...) and rearchitected the solution to extend the number of supported currencies and assign different fiscal year variants in the non-leading ledger.

entry.title: Re: where to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION
entry.content: You mean, like "FIRSTDAYOFCURRENTMONTH", ""FIRSTDAYOFCURRENTQUARTER", etc. (comment for indexing your question)

entry.title: Re: valuated stock in transit for scope item BDN
entry.content:
Hi, 

We had the same problem and yes there is still no standard solution to the scenario. So we build a work around to convert the BDN process to BJE (Make-to-order) + BD9:

Work around steps as below:

1. Set Strategy group 20 and procurement key F in the material master

2. Scheduling MRP run

3. Trigger Outbund delivery creation from Sales order based on goods receipt of the Purchase order (triggered from BJE)

5MQ setup now works as the item category now is TAN instead of CBAB. 

Best regards

Dave

entry.title: Understanding Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
In the fast-paced world of cloud ERP, ensuring the continuous health and efficiency of your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system is crucial. That’s where Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) come into play. Our new e-learning, “Unlocking Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,” provides you with an overview of the available CQCs for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and explains how and when to request these services.

Why Are CQCs Important?

Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) services are part of the SAP Enterprise Support, cloud edition support agreement which is embedded in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition subscription and does not require additional fees. These services help organizations proactively assess their systems, identify potential risks, and make sure you are following best practices from SAP.

CQCs are remote services that help reduce implementation risks and analyze your system and/or situation with an aim of providing improvement recommendations. With each CQC service you will be provided with an individualized detailed services report, which includes:

  • Management Summary  -  containing key findings at a glance
  • Action Plan  -  high level overview of the required actions identified from the service
  • Detailed Recommendations - containing all the findings, recommendations and required actionable items

CQCs for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition play a vital role in keeping your project on track throughout the SAP Activate phases, offering:

  • Tailored recommendations specific to your project
  • Best practices to ensure you are following best practices from SAP
  • Enablement resources for continuous improvement

What You’ll Discover in the E-Learning

Our e-learning module provides:

  • A clear introduction to CQC services
  • An overview of the specific CQC services available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Guidance on when and how to request CQCs to maximize their benefits

How to Access the E-Learning

Ready to take advantage of CQCs for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? Listen to our e-learning session to get started.

📌Access the E-Learning Here

Sign up for the Value Map for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to access the full list of CQCs and receive personalized guidance on your cloud ERP journey.

🚀How to Access Value Maps in 3 Easy Steps:

  1. Sign up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support (please allow up to 2 hours for processing).
  2. Access Value Maps via the Learning Hub.
  3. Navigate to the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps for SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Here, you can collaborate in forums, ask questions, or use the “Request a Call” feature to speak with an expert.

Value maps are intuitive to navigate, but we recommend scheduling an onboarding call to tailor the experience to your needs and highlight the most relevant content.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

  • Sara Riolobos is a seasoned professional with 25 years of SAP experience across diverse roles within Services and Support. Over the past decade, she has been dedicated to supporting SAP Enterprise Support customers, specializing as the Global Topic Owner for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud value maps. 

    Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact sarah.riolobos@sap.com  or elizabeth.cusack@sap.com.

     

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

it is also planned for other elements. but we might start with documents as a first element being cross-project available. you can vote for this in the influence request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/319126

we already plan this, but once we start we will gather first feedback with the once who requested or voted for this feature.

Cheers

Sinje

entry.title: Re: Dynamic restricted key figure in analytic model
entry.content:
Hi @shlomi_weiss 

I think you did not understand what I meant... you don't have to use a time dimension, but it is a new formula column in e.g. your fact view. 

Then you will use this characteristic in your restricted key figure in the AM.

entry.title: Is it possible to change the name of performa invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

we have a scenario in which we have to create a delivery in advance to print out the documents for custom clearance. My question is that we are going to create a perform invoice  against a delivery since at the time of documenatation we will not do a goods issue. Is it possible and Ok from process point of view to rename the performa invoice to an actual invoice so to get a custom clearnace? as for custom clearance cannot be done on a document with a header "Performa".

entry.title: Re: How Can I buy SAP SQL Anywhere 17 License
entry.content: Be aware, LTA, that Novalys can only distribute the "authenticated" version of SQL Anywhere. This means data updates can only be issued from either an appointed application, or from ISQL. Other connections can retrieve data. Can anyone listening here from SAP give us any idea if and when SQL Anywhere licenses will be available from the SAP Store? An indeterminate answere is hard to work with when you have a business to run and customers to give commitments to.

Will it be available for BTP Trial or Free tier?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Node.js - Insert vector embedding data into h...
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

wow, it's really an amazing change.

It does work after making change as you suggested, Thank you so much.

Thank you again.

entry.title: Re: Unable to write workflow container in WF Exit
entry.content:
The problem was that I used a different table definition when writing the container. The container defined in the workflow had a different structure.

Writing the the wrong table into the container worked perfectly; no errors. But when transferring the workitem container back to the workflow container, the type mismatch was detected. I did not see any error somewhere. I recognized by chance that I was using the wrong table structure. After using the correct structure, it worked properly.

entry.title: Re: Manual Selection of Production version Not working
entry.content: In case you are on S/4, you also need to set 'BOM Explosion' to '2' (see 3051827 - In S/4 HANA there is no popup when converting a planned order into a production order. - SAP for Me)

entry.title: Question: How to restrict access to EnableNow in regards to licensing (SuccessFactors & EnableNow)
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

We have the issue that we want to roll out EnableNow for a limited population only. Yet, in regards to licenses, we do not see any clean solution to restrict users in SuccessFactors not to access EnableNow (via SSO), so users outside the population do not generate costs just by accidentally opening the SAP Companion via the question mark button at the top. 
Is there any technical solution to this issue?

entry.title: Re: Print HU label at Product WT confirmation in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hi @Markas ,

since you want to print during warehouse task confirmation, have you already tried to work with warehouse order documents? I would assume, this form also has all the information you need and you can adjust the form layout as needed. The printing should be called also during warehouse task confirmation.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Partial goods issue in S4HANA (non-cloud)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a delivery where I have to pick 20 Kgs, for some reason 10 Kgs are missing due to late production.

Can I do a partial goods issue for 10 kgs ? or I need to adjust the qty of delivery to 10 and do a goods issue for a complete delivery and create a new one for the pending quantity? 

Please suggest, can we do a partial goods issue in SAP standard S4HANA?

entry.title: Configuring Serial Number Usage for Movement Types
entry.content:
Introduction

In inventory management, serial numbers play a crucial role in tracking and managing stock. Depending on your business requirements, you might need more flexibility in handling serial numbers to track and manage stock effectively. You can now define a different serial number usage for different movement types.

This blog post will guide you through how you can do this in your configuration environment using the configuration activity Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Types (106819). 

Why Configure Serial Number Usage? 

By default, serial number settings are defined in the serial number profile within the material master data. However, business scenarios such as goods receipts and goods issues may require different serial number handling. For instance, you might want optional serial numbers for goods receipts but mandatory ones for goods issues. This configuration allows for such flexibility. 

Prerequisites: 

  • Roles and Authorizations:  
    • For the Manage Your Solution app: The Business Process Expert is required. 
    • For the Customer Data Browser app: The Administrator (ADMINISTRATOR_DANA) user role is required.  It is included in the business catalog SAP_CORE_BC_CDB_PC. 
    • The business catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_LO_SER_PC (Serial Number Management - Configuration) must be assigned to your business role.   

 

Configuration Steps 

This configuration scenario is a two-step process: 

1. First, you must create a movement type group for your serial number profile which contains your desired serial number usage. For more information, see below or visit the SAP Help Portal: Step 1: Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Type 

2. Second, you assign the movement type group to the movement type. For more information, see below or visit the SAP Help Portal:  Step 2: Assign Group to Movement Type. 

 

Before You Start 

Before getting started, it is helpful to collect the required information from an existing material document that represents the process where you would like to change the serial number usage. We recommend the following: 

  1. Find a recent material document that represents the relevant process and copy the material document number. 
  2. With the user ADMINISTRATOR_DANA, enter the Customer Data Browser app.
  3. Choose the CDS Views table at the top. 
  4. Search for I_MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM_2 and select. 
  5. Use the search filters to find your material document. 
  6. Make a screenshot or copy the relevant fields for reference in the configuration activity.

Relevant fields for reference might include: Material Document, Number of Material Document, Material Number, Plant, Consumption Posting, GOODSMOVEMENTTYPEREFDOCTYPE, Special Stock Indicator, Special Stock Type, Receipt Indicator, and Movement Type. 

Step 1: Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Type 

In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Types (106819). For more information, see Configuration Environment of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

  1. Select the New Entries button to create a movement type group. 
  2. In the Movement Type Group column, create a 4-character movement type group name.
  3. Enter the relevant serial number profile. 
  4. In the Serial Number Usage column, use the drop down to select a usage type. 

     

Step 2: Assign Group to Movement Type

In the Assign Group to Movement Type segment, you can assign your newly created movement type group. 

  1. Select the Assign Group to Movement Type segment. 
  2. Find the movement type for the process where you require a different serial number usage. 
  3. In the Serial Number Movement Type Group column (Movement Type Group) of the relevant movement type, add your newly created movement type group. 

     

    4. If required, change the Receipt Indicator and the Consumption Posting to fit your needs. 

For more details, please see Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Types on the SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: Document Information Extraction – Understanding Schemas
entry.content:
What is a Document Information Extraction Schema? 

A schema contains a list of header fields and line items representing the target information that you want to extract from a particular type of document. You must select a schema when you add documents to the Document Information Extraction UI. When uploading documents to the Document Information Extraction service via the Document API, it’s not mandatory to add a schema to the Options Payload, but we strongly recommend this approach since it allows you to extract custom fields from documents along with the standard fields, and also benefit from generative AI. You can find lists of the standard fields in Extracted Header Fields and Extracted Line Items. 

 

Custom Schemas and SAP Schemas 

You can either create your own schema from scratch (for either standard or custom document types) or use a preconfigured SAP schema. The Document Information Extraction service provides SAP schemas for the following standard document types: 

  • Invoice ("schemaName": "SAP_invoice_schema"; "schemaId": "cf8cc8a9-1eee-42d9-9a3e-507a61baac23") 
  • Payment advice ("schemaName": "SAP_paymentAdvice_schema"; "schemaId": "b7fdcfac-7853-42bb-89d2-ede2ba1ce803") 
  • Purchase order ("schemaName": "SAP_purchaseOrder_schema"; "schemaId": "fbab052e-6f9b-4a5f-b42f-29a8162eb1bf") 

In addition, there’s an SAP schema for custom documents (SAP_OCROnly_schema). You can use these SAP schemas unchanged to upload documents. If you don’t want to configure your own schema, simply select the appropriate SAP schema when you upload a document to the Document Information Extraction service. No configuration is needed when you use SAP schemas in this way. In fact, it’s not possible to change or delete original SAP schemas. Alternatively, you can use the Document Information Extraction UI to copy a suitable SAP schema and edit the default fields in line with your needs.  

If you prefer to consume the Document Information Extraction service via API only, you can do the following using the respective endpoints: 

  • Use the relevant schemaId value to see details of the associated SAP schema, including the list of standard fields it contains (Schema API endpoint GET /schemas/{schemaId}). 
  • Create a new custom schema (Schema API endpoint POST /schemas endpoint)  
  • Use the SAP schema details to add standard fields to your new custom schema in line with your needs. Alternatively, add custom fields (Schema API endpoint POST /schemas/{schemaId}/versions/{version}/fields). 

 

Schema Versions 

Finally, when you configure, save, and activate a new schema, Document Information Extraction saves it automatically as version 1. You can use this initial version as the basis for creating additional versions of the same schema. All schema versions share the same name. 

Using versions is helpful if you process documents that have many of the fields provided in the original schema but also include others. You can also use different labels, descriptions, data types, and setup types for fields in different versions. 

 

See also: 

  • Schema API 
  • Schema Configuration
  • Schema Configuration: Best Practices 
  • Extraction Using Generative AI: Best Practices
  • Tutorial Mission: Shape Machine Learning to Process Custom Business Documents
  • Tutorial Mission: Shape Machine Learning to Process Standard Business Documents
  • Tutorial Mission: Use Generative AI to Process Business Documents

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and SAP generative AI Hub
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP generative AI Hub. It is beneficial if you have some basic knowledge about JavaScript as we're using the SAP Cloud SDK for AI with the JavaScript variant.

This CodeJam introduces attendees to aspects of exposing generative artificial intelligence (genAI) capabilities to execute tasks using a given business context.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with the theory behind genAI, SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, and learn how to use the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model to expose AI capabilities through your own OData service.

While working through the exercises, you'll become comfortable creating CDS-based service definitions and integrating them into the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and SAP AI Core Foundation Models.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday May 15th, 2025 in Herne, Germany 🇩🇪 from 10:00 am - 4:00 pm. The workshop will be hosted by rku.it GmbH. The event will be held in english.

The instructor will be the Developer Advocate @KRiedelsheimer 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome.

Please note that seating is limited - we can accomodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition following SAP Activate

Jose M.

entry.title: CodeJam CAP/AI in Herne, Germany
entry.content:
We have a CodeJam scheduled with rku.it GmbH Herne, Germany on May, the 15th 2025.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/build-ai-services-using-the-sap-cloud-application-programming-model-and-sap/ec-p/14021560#M736

There are still seats open, if you want to join me for a nice day of coding and learning click the link above!

Can't wait to see you in Herne!

HI @mb1011 

To be able to access the assessment to stay certified you need a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription.
To access the Learning Journeys that prepare for certification no subscription is required.
We've gathered answers to some of the most frequently asked questions about SAP Certification on our SAP Certification support page.

Kind regards
Margit

George

entry.title: Re: RE-FX Leasing valuation Rule Poland and Czech GAAP in...
entry.content:
Hello Daniel,

Thank you for your reply and details. I have checked the test Script for Scope Item 1T6. This scope is extended to Czech country but not to Poland. So I think I can configure Valuation Rule only for Czech and not for Poland.

 

 

I tried to create "Condition Valuation group - SSCUI 103405" for Czech and assigned it in "Valuation Rule  - SSCUI 102117" but all the existing Valuation Groups are delivered by SAP (starting with Y) but my newly created is started with Z (Y not available) as below:

I am wondering, whether this configuration will be delivered by SAP (using OSS Ticket) as our system is Public Cloud or I should continue using Z letter as shown above.

 

 

Thank you, 

Regards,

Shrinivas

entry.title: Re: VIZ Frame - reset selection
entry.content: This really helped me, thanks for sharing this answer.

entry.title: Re: Analytic Model was created with older version of the editor
entry.content:
We have same issue and I couldn't activate one analytic model because of the "/" in some dimensions attributes.
For one dimension, changing the technical names to remove the "/" solved the issue.
But other dimensions are so in use that we can't take the risk to modify them.
Good thing that SAP already found how to fix this.

entry.title: How to perform the Unit Test where the product code is made to read the data from the SAP Table?
entry.content:
I have the product code stored in the Class called ZUKI_ABC. Inside this class, there is a method called 'READ'. This READ method is responsible to read the Data from the SAP Table. 

Now I created the Local Test Class for performing a Unit Testing. But I want to know How can I write my Testing Methods to verify the results. Another question is, what Input data and expected data should I consider to verify the product code and its expected results?

entry.title: Using a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to a single role
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a task to create many roles (T-Code: PFCG) but need to do so using ABAP (using eclipse for the editor). The creation of roles is fine (using FM: PRGN_STRU_SAVE_DEFINITION) but the problem is I cannot find anything to add a Fiori launchpad catalog to the role created. The task requires that it is automated and so I cannot go into PFCG and add the catalog manually.

I have tried to work around this by using a recording but this also seems to not work.

So, is there a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to a single role. If not, is there another option I have missed?

Sorry if this question has already been asked, I have not been able to find it.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Public Cloud - Personnel Number range
entry.content: Confirm that this feature has been deprecated?

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Annotations Filter / FilterRestrictions showin...
entry.content:
Hi Cengiz,

This wasn't easy but I got it working:

            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/VerjaarConsignaties" >
                <Annotation Term="Capabilities.FilterRestrictions">
                    <Record Type="Capabilities.FilterRestrictionsType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="FilterExpressionRestrictions">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Capabilities.FilterExpressionRestrictionType">
                                    <PropertyValue  Property="Property" PropertyPath="Verjaardatum"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="SingleRange"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>

entry.title: Re: Data not updated in CDS view
entry.content: Old table: EBAN. For new, see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/smooth-transition-to-abap-for-cloud-development-cheat-sheet/ba-p/13571567

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content: @SharathSundar How can I be part of TIH work Zone group. Currently I am unable to access the demo link or the group. I don't see an option to join group or request access as well.

entry.title: Re: Is this a bug in the UI5 Element sap.ndc.BarcodeScann...
entry.content:
So this is not changing anything about the back-button functionality. But i found out, i can call this:

 

if (sap.ndc && sap.ndc.BarcodeScanner) {
   sap.ndc.BarcodeScanner.closeScanDialog();
}

 

each time the user is leaving (or entering) the view and then the barcodescannerbutton is working again.

entry.title: Re: Partial goods issue in S4HANA (non-cloud)
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

You need to adjust delivery quantity. Delivery is either posted or not. It can't be partially posted.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to Manage Multiple Delivery Points from a Single...
entry.content: @Rilievo What is the real challenge here? The original question asked about shipping points, i.e. source locations. Now you are asking about ship-to parties, i.e. destination locations.

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to make an addition for this post.

I needed to use the values of the Custom Field Code List in a development. I tried many ways but unfortunately failed every time.
I spent a bit too much time on this because a dynamic table is created for each domain code list and is not allowed to be used in any other development.

When I searched in SAP Notes I saw a report to delete Custom Field Code values, then I looked at how the report works and finally I realized that it works and I found the main table of Code Lists.

You can read the data of the value tables of the Domains created by the Custom Field Domain.

  • I_CustomFieldCodeListText
  • I_CustomFieldCodeListValue
  • I_CustomFieldCodeListValueHelp

entry.title: Required SAP Notes for Transition to New EBS Formats
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to introduce new formats for electronic bank statements (EBS) in transaction FF_5. Specifically, the transitions are as follows:

  • From camt 053.001.002 to camt 053.001.008
  • From camt 052.001.002 to camt 052.001.009
  • From pain 001.001.03 to pain 001.001.08
  • From dtazv to pain 001.001.09
  • From pain 008.001.02 to pain 008.001.08

I have found that for some of these formats, the following SAP Notes need to be implemented:

  • 3187339 - DE_"AZV-pain001" to replace "DTAZV" in international payments
  • 2881354 - Transformation camt053.001.008

However, I am unsure about the mandatory SAP Notes required for the other format transitions. Does anyone know which additional SAP Notes must be implemented before proceeding?

Thanks in advance for any insights!

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
@mahendra could you please try this link here: https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_7khq8t8p

I've updated it in the blog too.

Thank you

Matthias

entry.title: Re: Work flow question: How to find who holds a work flow?
entry.content:
The description from @icgomes  was excellent, although I would start from SWI2_FREQ or SWI1.  
Starting from SWI1, enter the workitem type as W (Dialog Task) and if you know it, enter the task itself.  

On the following page, you'll see a list of the workflow instances that have kicked off.  Choose one that is 'in process' for the purposes of your question.

Drill into one of these or push the 'golden scroll' (the Workflow Log icon).  

I know that you may have a different view of the workflow log - you will see the same information in the other views that I see here - it's just that the display format is somewhat different.  In the screenshot above, I see on the last line of the log that the status box is partially filled in  .  That indicates that a user has started processing a task.  

You can click on the folder icon to the far left to see who has started processing the task.

Please take your time getting accustomed to seeing the workflow log, and its components.   If the above doesn't help, I recommend you look at SAP Help or continue looking here on the Community.

entry.title: CDS : How to define analytical query using cell definition
entry.content:
This blog is about how to use cell definition in CDS analytical query as like in BW query. Lets start with brief overview about two structures.

 

Two Structures

The structure forms the foundational layout of the axes (rows or columns) in a data table, determining how information is organized and presented. The arrangement of the structure affects the order and quantity of key figures or characteristics displayed in the rows and columns of a query or report. More information can be found in  CDS : How to define analytical query using two str... - SAP Community

Cell Definition

A cell is the intersection between two structural components. Each cell in grid is defined by an element of the measures-structure and one of the characteristic-structure. 

Exception cell: When implicit cell definition overwritten by an explicit definition, cell is called as exception cell. It can be defined using formula or selection. Formulas for a cell must only use operands which are cells. 

Help cell: It does not have any direct connection with the corresponding structural elements. It is not embedded in the grid and not displayed, but can be used in formulas of an exception cell. 

In BW modelling tool query designer, In 'Cell' tab we can specify the cell definition.

In the above screenshot marked,

Red    : Exception cell 

Green : Formula to calculate the value for the exception cell

Blue   : Help cell

In analytical query to define the Exception cell, following annotation is used.

 

@AnalyticsDetails.query: {

  isCell: true,

  cellReference: {

    measureStructureElement: 'seatsocc',

    characteristicStructureElement: 'yearPlaceholder'

  }

}

 

A cell is specified with “@AnalyticsDetails.query.isCell: true”,

  • If it should overwrite a cell of the grid, then the coordinates can be specified with @AnalyticsDetails.query.cellReference (Exception Cell)
  • Otherwise, the element is invisible and must be hidden Consumption.hidden:true. (Help Cell)

A value of a cell in the grid can be obtained with CDS function - GET_CELL_REFERENCE_VALUE, which can be used in formula of an exception or help cell. 

Example

In the following example, 'exceptionCellRatioPercent' is Exception cell, cellReference defines exact coordinate of this cell. 'helpCellratio' is a helper cell, it does not have cellReference, it is not part of grid and has Consumption.hidden:true. It is used in formula of an exception cell 'exceptionCellRatioPercent' to calculate percentage of occupied seats.

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED
@EndUserText.label: 'Query with structure and cell definition'
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [#ANALYTICAL_QUERY]
// CDS Query like the normal query ZLR_2STRUCT_CELL_CAL
define transient view entity ZLR_2STRUCT_CELL_REF
provider contract analytical_query
as projection on ZOQ_FLIGHT
{

//Elements of the Key Figure Structure
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@EndUserText.label: 'Max Seats'
seatsmax,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@EndUserText.label: 'Occupied Seats'
seatsocc,


//Elements of the Characteristic Structure
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@EndUserText.label: '2020'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
case when flyear = '2020' then 1 else null end as year2020,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@EndUserText.label: 'Occupied %'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
case when flyear = '0000' then 1 else null end as yearPlaceholder,


abap.unit'%' as unitPercent,

//Help cell - used in formula of exception cell
@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@AnalyticsDetails.query: {
  isCell: true  
}
@Consumption.hidden: true
// scalar function with use of cell refernce
ratio_of( portion => GET_CELL_REFERENCE_VALUE(measure_struc_element => $projection.seatsocc, characteristic_struc_element => $projection.year2020 ),
total   => GET_CELL_REFERENCE_VALUE(measure_struc_element => $projection.seatsmax, characteristic_struc_element => $projection.year2020) )  as helpCellratio,


// Exception cell 
@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@AnalyticsDetails.query: {
  isCell: true,
  cellReference: {
    measureStructureElement: 'seatsocc',
    characteristicStructureElement: 'yearPlaceholder'
  
  }
}
@AnalyticsDetails.query.decimals: 2
@Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure: 'unitPercent'
$projection.helpCellratio * 100 as exceptionCellRatioPercent

 
}

 

Output

More information can be found Cell, Exception Cell and Help Cell | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Product Compliance - Collaboration within the supply chain - Campaign
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a question. Is there a simalar funtionality available in Public Cloud as is available in Private Cloud for "Collaboration within the supply chain - Campaign" as descibed in SAP Help

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ff6d35a34fbe4bea99e4ac41b0d5db03/43dff3ce269f453ca7940e9b2088a8a3.html?locale=en-US 

My customer want's to send messages/email to his suppliers to request article-related compliance data such as declarable substances for discrete products regarding regulatory lists as well as company-related compliance requirements.

entry.title: Re: Error: Document XXXX has been saved (pricing error) i...
entry.content: Thanks for the detailed analysis @Dequan Xu. The error was related to UOM conversion in the master data. Although it was already maintained, the system continued to display the error. We created a new master data entry, which resolved the issue.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Microlearning has moved to SAP Learning
entry.content:
We are excited to announce a significant milestone in SAP's learning offering: The SAP Learning Platform now offers the full portfolio of learning videos that were known as 'openSAP Microlearning' up until now!
This marks an important step forward in SAP's goal to provide a consolidated learning experience for everyone.

Microlearning has been a highly successful and popular format for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud community. With the integration of the short videos into the SAP Learning Platform, all migrated Microlearnings are now accessible in the category Videos. 

Follow these links for direct access:

  1.  All Videos
  2. All SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Videos
  3. All SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Videos

You can also navigate the learning site via "Browse" - “By Learning Types” - “Videos” in the upper menu bar.

Use the filters to search for Product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, or use keywords to search.

 

What does this migration mean for me?

The integration of openSAP Microlearning into the SAP Learning site means that all of the previously available Microlearnings will now be accessible within a comprehensive learning ecosystem. The old platform will cease operations in the course of 2025. Consequently, all content currently available on openSAP Microlearning will no longer be accessible.

 Why is this important?

  • The LSC Learning Platform consolidates various learning materials, making it easier for users to stay informed about the latest developments in SAP technologies.
  • In addition to familiar microlearning videos, the SAP Learning site offers a wide range of free, self-paced learning journeys and courses, enabling you to quickly acquire practical skills in key areas.
  • By bringing everything together on one platform, SAP ensures that all links and content remain current and functional.

What is next?

Enhanced options for filtering, playlists and integration with other sources in SAP Learning are underway. Stay tuned.

--------------
Read more about microlearning migration:

  • Blog post: openSAP Microlearning videos are now bite-sized learning videos on the SAP Learning site
  • FAQ from openSAP Microlearning.

----------------

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.  

🔎 Find All of Our Assets 

GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package designed to help businesses of all sizes to successfully adopt cloud ERP, anchored by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for optimized processes and intelligent, sustainable operations. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Working with the Attachment plugin - Cloud Application Programming
entry.content: @manishmatte1753 , I am also very interested in your question. Where you able to figure something out? If not, @arunkrishnamoorthy1988 do you have an answer for this question ?

entry.title: Re: Cumulativ Material Ledger initialization (MR22)
entry.content:
Hi Jessica,

Thank you for your help !
I was tricked by the 3 dots at the top right of my screen, which made the functionality button impossible to see...

I should have looked harder, sorry about that...

With the topic now open, my next question is obviously: How is it possible to make this mass stock value change in the system?
We'll have to carry out this operation on several thousand materials during the go-live weekend and the API API_MATERIAL_VALUATION_SRV I've tested doesn't seem to allow this debit/credit material functionality (I'm going to check again). And I don't see any file upload functionality apart from for the MR21 part.
Implementing a bot seems to me inconceivable as it would take at least 1 week to make the changes.

It would be a great help if you could get some inputs on the subject.

Thanks in advance !

Romain.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content: Congratulations to all the winners. Last years trip was amazing and I'm sure that the team will also delivery to you a amazing trip this year 🙂

entry.title: Payment method N is not defined in country/region XX; correct in s4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am encountering the following error in the "billingdocumentrequest_in" API. The payment terms are maintained for the customer, yet the error persists.

Error: "Payment method N is not defined in country/region SG; correct."

Does anyone have a solution for this?

 

Regards

Janarthanan

meetjana@hotmail.com

entry.title: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'" in Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am encountering the following error while using the POST method for Purchase Order in Postman. Although I am passing all the required entities, the error persists. Additionally, the error message does not specify which segment is missing, and there is no further clarification available in the "OData Error App."

I am struggling to resolve this issue and have attached a screenshot of the error for reference. Has anyone else faced a similar issue?

Error: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'

Looking forward to any insights.

Regards

Janarthanan

meetjana@hotmail.com

@Jacky_Liu any idea? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Data Replication pending status
entry.content: We are experiencing the same behavior in replication monitor as of yesterday. Any insight on how to resolve would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Hi everyone, I’m learning to use HANA Database Explorer, but it is missing from the extensions menu.
Re: Single web dispatcher - multiple HTTPS ports and SSL Certificates
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I have unknown sub parameter issue.

 

MACAS01-DWJ:dwjadm 1021> sapwebdisp pf=DWJ_W00_MACAS01-DWJ -checkconfig
Checking SAP Web Dispatcher Configuration
=========================================
ERROR Parameter "icm/server_port_1" is set to invalid value "PROT=HTTPS,SSL_CONFIG=ssl_config_1,PORT=44301": Unknown sub parameter name: SSL_CONFIG
MACAS01-DWJ.jesagroup.com will be used as local fully qualified host name.
Static config checks failed! Runtime checks will be skipped!

Check ended with 1 errors, 0 warnings

 

 

added following:

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------
# SAP Web Dispatcher Ports
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------
icm/ssl_config_1 = CRED=/usr/sap/DWJ/W00/sec/SAPSSLS_DSS.pse

icm/server_port_1 = PROT=HTTPS,SSL_CONFIG=ssl_config_1,PORT=44301

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: The good thing about SAML is that you can use "Allow users stored in Identity Authentication service to log on" option when the protocol between IAS and the application is SAML and you have configured the corporate provider to be used by default but not all app users have a user there. With OIDC this is not possible according to the documentation.

entry.title: Re: How-To: Use Script Tasks in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
@stefano_cataldo I went crazy with that one too.

Go to Control Tower - Environments (i.e. Public), then last tab for Processes and Workflows; there you would find what used to be easily accesible in the Monitoring section

entry.title: Re: Thresholds Prevent Unintended Deletion of Users when Provisioning with SAP Cloud Identity Servic
entry.content:
Hi,

In the logs, you will get the number of the entities that were not deleted. The error message will look something like this: 'Could not execute delete of user entities in target system <MyTargetSystem> as the defined delete threshold of 5 is exceeded. 10 entities were not deleted.' These are example values.

My testing showed that, even after enabling the property ips.trace.failed.entity.content=true, the log did not specify which particular entities were affected.

Best regards,

Ivelina

entry.title: Re: Static Factory Actions with Deep Parameters don't work
entry.content:
Hi @TharinduW please share your Behavior Implementation code how you are filling deep parameter. 

Meanwhile you may refer below blog post if that helps...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-restful-application-programming-model-rap-abap-rap-factory-actions/ba-p/13556598 

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?
entry.content: In that case, I think your solution is fine.

entry.title: Locally Configured Printers not Listed in SAP GUI (LP01)
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have this unusual issue wherein a user is not able to see the list of printers configured on her laptop locally whenever she is using LP01 (front-end printing). A different set of printer is being listed in sapgui. We performed following checks:

1. User access SAP in different workstation, printers in that workstation is listed correctly. Meaning its not issue with here SAP access.

2. User is able to printe outside SAP using the printer configured locally. Issue is when she tries to print from SAP.

3. Her colleagues are have no issue. Issue is specific to one user.

4. Tried to uninstall then reinstall SAP GUI on here workstation, same issuue.

I assume that this is not issue in SAP or configuration of the front end printing(LP01) since its working for other. Probably issue on her workstation, SAP GUI etc.

Can you guide me what else to check from the Windows side?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Reporting daily material stocks using CDS views
entry.content:
We currently have the same question. We need the valuated inventory (monthly granularity). In BW, we would use, as usual, 2LIS_03_BX, 2LIS_03_BF, and 2LIS_40_REVAL.

Now in Datasphere, we are thinking of the following approach: I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX for the quantity, and I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate for the price. After some checks, it seems that I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate has the history of the price of a material at the end of the period, so apparently, we only need to multiply this price by the quantity.

entry.title: Re: LINK TO WEBGUI IN TUTORIAL IS NOT WORKING ANYMORE?
entry.content: Nobody told me that one week ago... I just started to use the ES5 system yesterday. Thanks anyway.

entry.title: Re: Why the error loop on a Fiori Elements application wh...
entry.content:
"Hi @LucasMagriniRigo,

I had the same issue and resolved it by changing the table type in the manifest.json from 'grid' to 'responsive'.

Greetings Paul

entry.title: Re: Fiori data source how to view
entry.content: Thanks for sharing, this is real good...

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile not picking up some users
entry.content:
Have you checked the 'Country' you have picked for them is the correct one. You may have more than one set up and not realise that users are in it for example Italy or ITALY may be 2 separate countries on the picklist.

Also, do you have any other rules such as must be 'Active', and if so are they active?

There must be a reason, and if you have checked everything then I think a ticket with support might be needed.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
@kumar_palaniasari  Hi, yes, correct in this case, they have to pass the assessment to further extend the validity.

Learning Managers with a Learning Hub Partner subscription and a reporting role can use the analytics dashboard to see the certification status and validity dates of their employees.

 

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Robotic process automation for Learning
entry.content:
Hi

Does anyone use Robotic Process Automation to manage any of their regular tasks in Learning? We are looking to save admin time and this may be an option.

Thanks, Sam

entry.title: Re: How do we identify Create/Update/Delete actions in RA...
entry.content:
Hi @Ram_peddireddi You may want to try Global / Instance Authorisation that has the Actions user bring to perform.

For more details you may refer below Blog post...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-rap-global-authorization/ba-p/13558291 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-rap-instance-authorization/ba-p/13570835 

*   Check if EDIT operation is triggered or not 
    IF requested_authorizations-%update = if_abap_behv=>mk-on OR
        requested_authorizations-%action-Edit   = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
*--> Your code goes here
    ENDIF.

 

Hope this helps...

Thanks-

entry.title: How to flag deletion indicator as 'X' for line item of "Purchase Requestion"
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to flag the deletion indicator (EBAN-LOEKZ) as 'X' for the line item of Purchase Requestion.

I've used FM "BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE" in one report, but it is not working properly. It is throwing me an error - " 06269 : This item can only be deleted via the associated sales document "
(When i debugged the BAPI i found that at one line debugger is not going on this perform  "PERFORM requisition_delete TABLES xeban "  because of "EXIT" keyword used.)

I have already see many threads on internet, but not working.

I want any solution that would update the EBAN-LOEKZ as 'X' by using any function module, or any other way.

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance (new): automatic substance checks not starting with mass uploaded materials
entry.content:
Thank you @sergey_nozhenko.

Your answer points me in a good direction, even if my cliente is using Product Compliance "new", which has a different approach and a somewhat different data architecture.

I will check the background jobs, it might miss something there. Customizing documentation/help is a bit confusing regarding these in PC. I started implementing with release 2021 and then my client upgraded to Release 2023; this version brought some changes in customizing, generally "for the better" but regarding PCEP jobs, the difference in documentation was stark, seemingly missing to refer a lot of the jobs... 

Well, back to testing and digging the problem

entry.title: Become an Early Adopter for the Knowledge Graph Engine in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
It has been one of the key announcements for HANA Cloud during TechEd 2024 – the addition of the Knowledge Graph Engine in SAP HANA Cloud. The GA end of Q1 2025 will further strengthen our database-as-a-service’s capabilities to help address Business AI scenarios. Among the exciting and new use cases are for example: 

  • Linked Data & Federated Querying: Integrate your internal data with linked open data and query cross-domains, by leveraging federated SPARQL ➡️ Enriching clinical research with external biomedical ontologies 
  • Enterprise Knowledge Graphs: Create a semantic representation of your business data to enhance search, data discovery and eventually decision-making ➡️ Connect customer, product, and transaction data for a 360-degree business view 
  • Generative AI & RAG: Structure your data for AI-driven reasoning and ground LLMs with verifiable Knowledge ➡️ Enhance chatbot responses using semantic linking, fact checking and reasoning based on structured Knowledge 
  • Regulatory Compliance & Fraud Detection: Represent compliance rules as RDF triples and automate checks via inferencing to identify hidden risks through graph-based anomaly detection and relationship patterns. ➡️ Detect non-compliant transactions and fraudulent activities by analyzing money transfers and hidden relationships in financial networks 

….And more! 

 

Are you curious to kickstart your own use case leveraging the Knowledge Graph Engine in SAP HANA Cloud? Then don’t miss out and register for our upcoming Early Adopter Care Program. 

Join the exclusive program, designed for a selected group of customers and partners like yourself. Registration is now open from February 17th o July 31st, 2025.  

Take advantage of the unique opportunity for your company to engage directly with SAP HANA development and product management teams. As part of this free-of-charge initiative, you'll have the chance to actively participate in shaping the development process over a 3-6 month period, tailored to your needs and preferences.  

By joining, you'll not only gain valuable insights and firsthand experience with SAP HANA Cloud’s Knowledge Graph Engine, but also expand your company's SAP Knowledge and network. Don't miss out on this exciting chance to be at the forefront of innovation and collaboration. Sign up today!  

 

Prerequisites:   

We’ll accept both, existing and new SAP HANA Cloud customers who are eager to explore SAP HANA Cloud’s Knowledge Graph Engine. If you're planning to update to or adopt the QRC1 2025 version of SAP HANA Cloud, we want you on board! To optimize the benefits of the program, it is recommended to meet the following prerequisites:  

  • Licensing Requirements: Holds an SAP HANA Cloud license and actively engages with SAP HANA Cloud services. 
  • Recommended Knowledge: Preferably experienced with Knowledge Graph concepts, RDF triples, SPARQL querying, and integrating graph data with enterprise systems. 
  • Exploration Focus: Interest in exploring Knowledge Graph use cases such as semantic data integration, enterprise knowledge graphs, graph-based AI reasoning, and similarity searches across structured and unstructured data. 
  • Integration Goals: Aiming to create and manage knowledge graphs that integrate enterprise data, providing enriched context, intelligent search, and enhanced decision-making. 
  • Infrastructure Requirements: Optimized SAP HANA Cloud instance with moderate to high-memory configuration for large-scale graph processing. 

Additionally, you should desire an immediate productive implementation, aim for a go-live within the EAC timeline and be willing to become a reference.  

 

Programm Process:

During a scoping session, we'll work together to identify the exact feature and use case that align with your needs. Once registered, you'll have the opportunity to present your project's scope and use case in a 30–60-minute session directly to SAP development and product management teams. This session ensures a shared understanding and secures the right support throughout your project journey.  

To participate, your company must designate a project lead as the single point of contact and commit to providing feedback during and after the project.  

Registration opened on February 17th and will remain open until July 31st, 2025. Don't miss this chance to be part of the innovation journey with SAP HANA Cloud!

entry.title: Re: The Power of Joule for Developers, ABAP AI Capabilities
entry.content:
Hi @lienards  , thank you very much for sharing, amazing news for all the ABAP community. Are there any plans to release similar developer co-pilot AI for on-premise ABAP?

Does LLM consider any of open-source ABAP projects available on Github ?

 

Thank you!

Vlad

entry.title: Re: Using a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to a single role
entry.content: Is there one method in this class for adding a Fiori service catalog? 2465316 - Role menu API: Base class CL_PFCG_MENU_MODIFY - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: error when trying to connect to public cloud connecti...
entry.content: Hi @George
